task_completion.description: Verify the Discount Schema is created with the correct name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a record or form in iDempiere showing the Name field as 'Bulk Order Incentive 2024' and the Description field as 'Volume-based tiered discounts for bulk purchasing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Discount Type is set to 'Breaks'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or field labeled 'Discount Type' with the value 'Breaks' (or 'B') selected in the schema header.

task_completion.description: Verify the first discount break line is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item or form in the Discount Schema Break tab with Sequence '10', Break Value '10', and Discount '5' (or 5%).

task_completion.description: Verify the second discount break line is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item or form in the Discount Schema Break tab with Sequence '20', Break Value '25', and Discount '8' (or 8%).

task_completion.description: Verify the third discount break line is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item or form in the Discount Schema Break tab with Sequence '30', Break Value '50', and Discount '12' (or 12%).

task_completion.description: Verify the fourth discount break line is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item or form in the Discount Schema Break tab with Sequence '40', Break Value '100', and Discount '15' (or 15%).

task_completion.description: Verify the schema and all lines are active and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Active' checkbox being checked on the header and line items, and signs of the records being saved (e.g., save icon clicked, records appearing in a list view, or a status bar indicating saved changes).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the schema.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface being used, not terminal commands, API calls, or SQL scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the iDempiere menus, tabs, and forms, not a text editor or mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the appropriate fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values should be visible within the standard iDempiere input fields or tables, not just pasted as a single block of text somewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Name: 'Bulk Order Incentive 2024'. Target Type: 'Breaks' (internal value 'B'). Break Lines: 1) Seq: 10, Break Value: 10, Discount: 5%. 2) Seq: 20, Break Value: 25, Discount: 8%. 3) Seq: 30, Break Value: 50, Discount: 12%. 4) Seq: 40, Break Value: 100, Discount: 15%.
